acceptance_criteria: list of concrete, testable planning constraints
constraints: list of hard or soft constraints discovered from the request and approved context
assumptions: list of explicit assumptions that are safe to carry forward
resolved_by_default: list of details the model decided can proceed without asking the user

open_questions.default: recommended default if user wants to move faster
open_questions.blocking_reason: why this blocks planning or contract drafting
open_questions.source: what ambiguity or context triggered the question

decisions.source: which ambiguity or risk this decision comes from

can_proceed: boolean, true only when zero blocking ambiguity remains for planning
